whyCandidateMatters: Mosque-Madrasa of Taghri Bardi would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Burji Mamluk layer in Al-Saliba through a mosque-madrasa rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
